sentences.text: Flour and friendship are two different things, and they should not be mixed up.
The words 'flour' and 'friendship' are spelled differently, and they mean different things.
Everyone can understand that these words are not the same.
The Miller's Wife said, 'You speak so well!' while she poured herself a large glass of warm ale.
